  • dyana.core
  • dyana.core.timebase

dyana.core.timebase#

Classes

TimeBase([hop_s, n_frames])

Canonical global timebase for DYANA.
class dyana.core.timebase.TimeBase(hop_s=0.01, n_frames=None)[source]#

Bases: object

Canonical global timebase for DYANA.

Notes

  • TimeBase is immutable.

  • The canonical DYANA timebase is 10 ms hop.

  • Internal computations may use other hops, but boundaries must resample.

Parameters:

  • hop_s (float)

  • n_frames (int | None)

classmethod canonical(n_frames=None)[source]#

Construct the canonical 10 ms timebase.

Parameters:

  • n_frames (int | None) – Optional number of frames to bind to this timebase. Validation will enforce matching length when present.

  • example (Usage)

  • ------------- – tb = TimeBase.canonical() tb_frames = TimeBase.canonical(n_frames=500)

Return type:

TimeBase

classmethod from_hop_seconds(hop_seconds, n_frames=None)[source]#

Construct a timebase from an explicit hop size in seconds.

Notes

  • This helper is explicit about non-canonical hops. Use canonical() for the global 10 ms grid.

Parameters:

  • hop_seconds (float) – Frame hop in seconds. Must be positive.

  • n_frames (int | None) – Optional frame count bound to this timebase.

  • example (Usage)

  • ------------- – tb = TimeBase.from_hop_seconds(0.02)

Return type:

TimeBase

frame_times(n_frames)[source]#

Array of frame times (seconds), shape (n_frames,).

Parameters:

n_frames (int)

Return type:

ndarray

frame_to_time(frame_index)[source]#

Convert frame index to time in seconds.

Parameters:

frame_index (int)

Return type:

float

num_frames(duration_s)[source]#

Number of frames needed to cover a duration.

Parameters:

duration_s (float)

Return type:

int

require_canonical()[source]#

Raise a ValueError if the timebase is not canonical.

Return type:

None

time_to_frame(time_s)[source]#

Convert time in seconds to frame index (floor semantics).

Parameters:

time_s (float)

Return type:

int

property hop_ms: float#

Frame hop in milliseconds.

hop_s: float = 0.01#
property is_canonical: bool#

Whether this timebase matches the canonical 10 ms hop.

n_frames: int | None = None#
